description: React component 'NoteCard' for rendering a note with title, content, tags, and last updated date.

methods.name: NoteCard
methods.description: React functional component that displays a note with title, content, tags, and timestamp, handling click events and formatting dates.

methods.name: formatDate
methods.description: Helper function to format 'updated_at' date string into a human-readable date. Returns empty string if no date provided.
